notes: Bug requires Android device or emulator to reproduce at runtime. Created a MAUI repro project with both SKGLView and SKCanvasView that checks MainThread.IsMainThread in PaintSurface handlers. The project builds successfully for net10.0-android with both SkiaSharp 3.116.1 and 3.119.2, but cannot be run without an Android emulator or device. Source-level simulation confirms the architectural issue: SKGLViewHandler.Android.cs calls VirtualView?.OnPaintSurface() directly from the GL thread without any main-thread marshaling. In contrast, SKGLViewHandler.iOS.cs uses CADisplayLink and BeginInvokeOnMainThread to ensure main-thread execution. The main branch source shows no fix has been applied.
blockers: Requires Android device or emulator — ANDROID_HOME not set, no Android SDK, emulator, or adb available in this environment
Bug manifests at runtime (threading behavior) — build-only testing cannot verify which thread PaintSurface fires on
Cannot use Docker as fallback — Android MAUI apps require Android runtime, not Linux containers

reproductionSteps.description: Create MAUI project with SKGLView and SKCanvasView that checks MainThread.IsMainThread in PaintSurface handlers
reproductionSteps.command: dotnet new maui -n Repro && cd Repro && dotnet add package SkiaSharp.Views.Maui.Controls --version 3.116.1
reproductionSteps.output: Restored Repro.csproj (in 2.93 sec). PackageReference for 'SkiaSharp.Views.Maui.Controls' version '3.116.1' added.

filesCreated.description: MAUI entry point with UseSkiaSharp() registration
XAML page with both SKGLView and SKCanvasView for comparing thread behavior
filesCreated.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8" ?>
<ContentPage xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/dotnet/2021/maui"
             xmlns:x="http://schemas.microsoft.com/winfx/2009/xaml"
             xmlns:skia="clr-namespace:SkiaSharp.Views.Maui.Controls;assembly=SkiaSharp.Views.Maui.Controls"
             x:Class="Repro.MainPage">
    <VerticalStackLayout Padding="30,0" Spacing="25">
        <Label x:Name="ThreadLabel" Text="Waiting for PaintSurface..." FontSize="18" />
        <skia:SKGLView x:Name="GlView" HeightRequest="300" PaintSurface="OnGLPaintSurface" />
        <skia:SKCanvasView x:Name="CanvasView" HeightRequest="300" PaintSurface="OnCanvasPaintSurface" />
    </VerticalStackLayout>
</ContentPage>

filesCreated.description: Code-behind that logs MainThread.IsMainThread and thread ID for both SKGLView and SKCanvasView PaintSurface events, renders green if main thread, red if not

reproductionSteps.description: Build MAUI repro project for Android with SkiaSharp 3.116.1
reproductionSteps.output: Build succeeded. 4 Warning(s) 0 Error(s). Repro -> bin/Debug/net10.0-android/Repro.dll

reproductionSteps.description: Verify no Android emulator or device available to run the app
reproductionSteps.command: echo $ANDROID_HOME; which adb; which emulator; dotnet workload list | grep android
reproductionSteps.output: ANDROID_HOME: not set. adb: not found. emulator: not found. No Android workload for current SDK (10.0.102). Cannot deploy or run the MAUI app on Android.

reproductionSteps.description: Build MAUI repro project for Android with latest SkiaSharp 3.119.2 in clean directory
reproductionSteps.command: dotnet add package SkiaSharp.Views.Maui.Controls --version 3.119.2 && rm -rf bin/ obj/ && dotnet build -f net10.0-android
reproductionSteps.output: Build succeeded. 4 Warning(s) 0 Error(s). Repro -> bin/Debug/net10.0-android/Repro.dll

reproductionSteps.description: Source-level simulation: verify Android MAUI handler lacks thread marshaling while iOS handler has it. Searched SKGLViewHandler.Android.cs for MainThread, InvokeOnMainThread, BeginInvoke, Dispatcher — zero matches. iOS handler uses CADisplayLink and BeginInvokeOnMainThread. GLTextureView runs OnDrawFrame on a dedicated GL thread. No fix present on main branch.
reproductionSteps.output: Android handler: 0 matches for thread marshaling. iOS handler: 2 matches (BeginInvokeOnMainThread, CADisplayLink). Confirmed: OnPaintSurface() in Android handler directly calls VirtualView?.OnPaintSurface() on the GL thread without marshaling.

corrections.corrected: This is an Android MAUI runtime issue requiring an Android device or emulator. Linux (Docker) cannot host Android MAUI apps. The correct repro platform is Android (physical device or emulator).
